SMAD 1.27.4
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • 1. Introduction to SMAD
    • 2. Scoring Functions in SMAD

PE

Source: R/PE.R
PE.Rd

Purification Enrichment (PE) Score Calculation

PE(datInput, rBait = 0.37, cntPseudo = 1)

Arguments

datInput

data.frame with columns: idRun, idBait, idPrey

rBait

probability a true interaction is detected (default 0.37)

cntPseudo

pseudocount for prey frequency estimation (default 1)

Value

data.frame with columns: PPI, InteractorA, InteractorB, BP, PB, spokeBP, spokePB, matrixPP, PE

Details

Computes PE scores for protein-protein interactions from AP-MS data. Based on Collins et al. (2007) Bayes classifier framework.

References

Collins, S.R., et al. "Toward a comprehensive autophagy protein-protein interaction network." Molecular systems biology 3.1 (2007): 88.

Author

Qingzhou Zhang, zqzneptune@hotmail.com

Examples

data(TestDatInput)
datScore <- PE(TestDatInput)
head(datScore)
#>         PPI        PB        BP InteractorA InteractorB spokeBP spokePB
#> 1  A2M~ACLY  ACLY:A2M  A2M:ACLY         A2M        ACLY      NA      NA
#> 2   A2M~AGK   AGK:A2M   A2M:AGK         A2M         AGK      NA      NA
#> 3  A2M~AGO1  AGO1:A2M  A2M:AGO1         A2M        AGO1      NA      NA
#> 4  A2M~AHCY  AHCY:A2M  A2M:AHCY         A2M        AHCY      NA      NA
#> 5 A2M~AHSA1 AHSA1:A2M A2M:AHSA1         A2M       AHSA1      NA      NA
#> 6 A2M~AKAP8 AKAP8:A2M A2M:AKAP8         A2M       AKAP8      NA      NA
#>    matrixPP        PE
#> 1 0.6405372 0.6405372
#> 2 0.7885690 0.7885690
#> 3 0.5711720 0.5711720
#> 4 0.4918723 0.4918723
#> 5 1.0596816 1.0596816
#> 6 1.0596816 1.0596816
